Relative position of hole (based on pipe length)
Tooth root chord at the 30° tangent (relative to module)
Tooth root radius at the 30° tangent (relative to module)
Required tooth root minimum safety factor (Plewe 1980)
Rolling length where amount of modification is specified
Rolling length where amount of profile twist is specified
Rolling tangential velocity at the calculation points (AGMA 925:A03)
Root diameter of virtual cylindrical gear (ISO 10300:2014)
Root diameter of virtual cylindrical gear (ISO 10300:2023)
Root mean square roughness at filter cutoff of wavelength (AGMA 925:A03)
Diameter at start of root relief (reference diameter)
Diameter where tangential transition area ends
Diameter where tangential transition area starts
Diameter where amount of modification is specified
Length where amount of modification is specified
Length of tangential transition area end
Length of tangential transition area start
Running-in allowance which reduces the initial pitch deviation (ISO 6336:2006)
Running-in allowance which reduces the initial pitch deviation (ISO 6336:2019)
Safety against beginning plasticity hub (maximum distortion criterion) (DIN 7190:2017)
Safety against beginning plasticity shaft (maximum distortion criterion) (DIN 7190:2017)
Safety factor tooth root design calculation (VDI 2736:2014)
Safety factor tooth root for peak loads (VDI 2736:2014)
Semi-width of the Hertzian contact band of the calculation points (AGMA 925:A03)
Ids of the associated point/element list
Inner shaft diameter for the operating clearance calculation
Shaft safety against plastic deformation at equivalent torque (DIN 6892:2012)
Shaft safety against plastic deformation at maximum torque (DIN 6892:2012)
Shape of feather key according to DIN 6885:2021
Shear stress at tooth root with wear (DIN 3996:2019)
Shear stress at tooth root without wear (DIN 3996:2019)
Maximum length of inner ring contact
Maximum length of outer ring contact
Sliding velocitiy at contact point Y (ISO 10300:2021)
Sliding velocity at the calculation points (AGMA 925:A03)
Sliding velocity in profile direction at contact point Y (ISO 10300:2021)
Sliding velocity in tooth lengthwise direction at the mean point (ISO 10300:2021)
Small outer diameter with shouldered hub (DIN 6892:2012)
Specific dielectric strength of the lubricant
Specific film thickness with a cutoff wavelength equal to the Hertzian contact width at the calculation points (AGMA 925:A03)
Speed parameter for central film thickness at the calculation points (AGMA 925 A03)
Standard deviation of the minimum specific film thickness (AGMA 925:A03)
Standard deviation for the permissible stress at the point between limited life and long life
Is cast material and bending loaded (FKM RFN:2012)
Is the component rolled and is the area under consideration stressed mainly transverse to the main machining direction (FKM RFN:2012)
Probability of the occurrence of all maxima at the same time (FKM RFN:2012)
Stress concetration and stress correction factor (method B2) (ISO 10300:2014)
Stress concetration and stress correction factor (method B2) (ISO 10300:2023)
Stress correction factor for the dimensions of standard test gear (ISO 10300:2014)
Stress correction factor for the dimensions of standard test gear (ISO 10300:2023)
Stress correction factor for load application at tooth tip (ISO 10300:2014)
Stress correction factor for load application at tooth tip (ISO 10300:2023)
Stress correction factor tooth root strength (VDI 2736:2014)
Circumferential angle of struts of planet carrier
Inner diameter of struts of planet carrier
Radius of planet recess in the struts of the planet carrier
Sum of addendum modification coefficients (profile shift coefficients)
Sum of velocities at contact point Y (ISO 10300:2021)
Sum of velocities in lengthwise direction (ISO 10300:2021)
Sum of velocities in profile direction at contact point Y (ISO 10300:2021)
Sum of velocities vertical to the contact line at contact point Y (ISO 10300:2021)
Supporting length of the feather key
Supporting length of the hub keyway
Supporting length of the shaft keyway
Width of the large diameter hub part within the supporting length of the key (DIN 6892 2012)
Surface velocity vertical to the contact line (ISO 10300:2021)
Temperature coefficient a_Tt for tensile strength (FKM RFN:2012)
Temperature coefficient a_Tt for yield strength (FKM RFN:2012)
Temperature coefficient b_Tt for tensile strength (FKM RFN:2012)
Temperature coefficient b_Tt for yield strength (FKM RFN:2012)
Temperature coefficient c_Tt for tensile strength (FKM RFN:2012)
Temperature coefficient c_Tt for yield strength (FKM RFN:2012)
Temperature constant C for tensile strength (FKM RFN:2012)
Temperature constant C for yield strength (FKM RFN:2012)
Temperature variation for modulus of elasticity
Tilting of inner side around u axis
Tilting of inner side around v axis
Tilting of inner side around w axis
Tilting of outer side around u axis
Tilting around v axis of outer side
Tilting around w axis of outer side
Time of operation at temperature under static load (FKM RFN:2012)
Tip radius factor reference profile of tool
Tip corner radius reference profile of tool
Tip diameter of virtual cylindrical gear in normal section (ISO 10300:2014)
Tip diameter of virtual cylindrical gear in normal section (ISO 10300:2023)
Tip diameter of virtual cylindrical gear (ISO 10300:2014)
Tip diameter of virtual cylindrical gear (ISO 10300:2023)
Diameter at start of tip relief (reference diameter)
Diameter where tangential transition area of linear tip relief ends
Diameter where tangential transition area of linear tip relief starts
Diameter where amount of modification is specified
Rolling length where amount of modification is specified
Length of tangential transition area end of linear tip relief
Length of tangential transition area start of linear tip relief
Tolerance zone of base tangent length (DIN 5480:2006)
Single pair tooth contact factor pitting (ISO 6336:2006)
Single pair tooth contact factor pitting (ISO 6336:2019)
Tooth form factor tooth root (method B2) (ISO 10300:2014)
Tooth form factor tooth root (method B2) (ISO 10300:2023)
Tooth root chord at the critical section (ISO 6336:2006)
Tooth root chord at the critical section (ISO 6336:2019)
Tooth root radius at the critical section (ISO 6336:2006)
Tooth root radius at the critical section (ISO 6336:2019)
Tooth root stress under peak torque (VDI 2736:2014)
Tooth thickness half angle at active root diameter
Tooth thickness half angle at active tip diameter
Tooth thickness half angle at base diameter
Tooth thickness half angle at pitch diameter
Tooth thickness half angle at reference diameter
Tooth thickness half angle at root diameter
Tooth thickness half angle at root form diameter
Tooth thickness half angle at tip diameter
Tooth thickness half angle at tip form diameter
Torque around u-axis acting on the component on the inner side
Torque around v-axis acting on the component on the inner side
Torque around w-axis acting on the component on the inner side
Torque around u-axis acting on the component on the outer side
Torque around v-axis acting on the component on the outer side
Torque around w-axis acting on the component on the outer side
Torque around u-axis acting on the shaft
Torque around v-axis acting on the shaft
Torque around w-axis acting on the shaft
Stress ratio of the torsional torque
Total single flank composite tolerance class (DIN 3963:1978)
Total single flank composite tolerance class (ISO 1328:2013)
Transverse circular pitch on reference circle
Transverse radius of curvature at point A
Transverse radius of curvature at point B
Transverse radius of curvature at point C
Transverse radius of curvature at point D
Transverse radius of curvature at point E

Transverse radius of relative curvature at point A
Transverse radius of relative curvature at point B
Transverse radius of relative curvature at point C
Transverse radius of relative curvature at point D
Transverse radius of relative curvature at point E
Transverse relative radius of curvature of calculation points (AGMA 925:A03)
Transverse tooth thickness at active root diameter
Transverse tooth thickness at active tip diameter
Transverse tooth thickness at pitch diameter
Transverse tooth thickness at reference diameter
Transverse tooth thickness at root diameter
Transverse tooth thickness at root form diameter
Transverse tooth thickness at tip diameter
Transverse tooth thickness at tip form diameter

attribute.name: Width of large outer diameter with shouldered hub (DIN 6892:2012)
Width of small outer diameter with shouldered hub (DIN 6892:2012)
